title: BusinessRules Configuration
description: Schema for defining business rules that will be code-generated

className.description: The C# class name for the generated business rule (PascalCase)

key.description: Unique identifier for the business rule (typically UPPER_SNAKE_CASE)

rule.description: Human-readable description of the business rule

description.description: Additional details about the business rule

category.description: Category for grouping related business rules
